description: You are an IT Asset Analyst performing a quarterly hardware audit reconciliation. The physical inventory team has verified serial numbers for 3 existing server assets and found discrepancies with the CMDB records. Using the audit reconciliation file at /home/ga/Desktop/serial_audit_q1_2026.csv, log in to CMDBuild at http://localhost:8090/cmdbuild/ui/ (admin/admin), locate each server CI by its Code, and update its Serial Number field to match the physically verified serial from the audit file. Also append 'Q1-2026 Audit: Serial verified' to each asset's Notes field.
